home.header: Lcoin: A Free Platform for Students
home.header_text_1: A platform for students to ask for help or offer their expertise to solve academic tasks.
home.header_text_2: Post tasks or help others without commissions or middlemen.
home.header_text_3: (more details in the FAQ section after registration)
home.text_1: After registration, go to the 'My Orders' section, post an order by specifying the subject, deadline, and price.
home.text_2: After registration, find an order using 'Filters' in the 'Search orders' section.
home.text_3: Discuss details and agree on terms in the 'Messages' section.

mainlayout.confirm_logout: Are you sure that you want to leave?

feedback.info_text: Found a bug or have an idea? Briefly describe the matter in a couple of sentences, and we'll look into it.
feedback.success_info: We're glad you're helping our service grow.

FAQ.order_1: To create a new task, go to the section
FAQ.order_2: Once published, your order will appear in the general search for all executors.
FAQ.status_order_pending: the customer has selected an executor, waiting for their confirmation.
FAQ.bid_1: Look for suitable tasks in the section
FAQ.bid_2: Offer your terms by placing a bid on an order you like.
FAQ.status_bid_offer: executor received an offer. They must confirm it in the chat.
FAQ.status_bid_progress: executor has officially started the work.
FAQ.profile_info_1: When viewing any profile, you can switch between roles
FAQ.profile_info_2: This allows you to see the user's rating and list of completed works for each of the selected roles.
FAQ.verification_anonym: We verify the student card only to confirm student status. The card photo is confidential and not visible to other users.
FAQ.chat_text_1: To start a new chat, click on the user's
FAQ.chat_text_2: (in the order card, details, or bid)
FAQ.chat_text_3: In the profile that opens, click the button
FAQ.chat_text_4: after which a chat with this user will be created.
FAQ.chat_text_5: All your active conversations and message history are stored in the

disputes.text_review: No disputes are currently under review
disputes.text_resolved: You have no resolved disputes yet

chats.empty_info: Start a conversation by visiting a user's profile through their order or search.

orders.subject: Subject

search_orders.help_text: and someone will surely help you

reviews.confirm_send: Are you sure you want to submit your review?

order_message.confirm_send: Are you sure you want to send the offer?
order_message.confirm_decline_offer: Are you sure you want to cancel the offer?
order_message.confirm_accept: Are you sure you want to accept the offer?
order_message.confirm_decline: Are you sure you want to decline the offer?
order_message.confirm_complete: Are you sure you want to confirm completion?
order_message.confirm_dispute: Are you sure you want to open a dispute?
order_message.text_author_offer: You have sent an offer for this order
order_message.text_opponent_offer: You have received an offer. Please accept or decline it
order_message.text_author_accept: The freelancer accepted the offer. Confirm completion once the work is done
order_message.text_opponent_accept: You have successfully accepted the offer
order_message.text_author_dispute: The order is now in dispute. Please go to the dispute chat
order_message.text_opponent_dispute: The order is now in dispute. Please go to the dispute chat

verify.pending_text: Photos under review. Expect confirmation within 24 hours.
verify.title: User verification
verify.step_1_desc: Please upload a clear photo of the front of your ISIC card as shown in the example.
verify.security_note: This is required for community security and identity verification.
verify.ISIC_in_safe: *Your ISIC will not be visible to other users*
verify.benefit_2: Your orders and bids will appear higher in the list

load.text_wait: Please wait a moment, they will appear shortly

error_message.price_abs: Price must be a positive whole number
error_message.term_abs: Term must be a positive whole number (at least 1 day)
error_message.review_max_char: The review must be a maximum of 100 characters
error_message.grade_condition: The rating must be between 1 and 5. We have set it to 5 by default.
error_message.order_approved: You cannot delete the order because it has already been approved
error_message.order_approved_bid: You cannot delete the bid because the order has already been approved
error_message.refresh_hint: Refresh the page or check the URL. If the issue persists, let us know — we're here to help!
error_message.invalid_type_file: Invalid file type. Only JPG and PNG are supported
error_message.not_allow_chat_myself: You cannot start a chat with yourself
error_message.not_allow: You are not authorized to perform this action
error_message.order_in_work: Order is already in progress or deleted
error_message.no_data: Data is missing or not entered
error_message.page_not_found_desc: It looks like we can't find what you're looking for. The address might have been changed or the page was deleted.
error_message.unverified_limit_order: Order limit for guest users exceeded. Upload your ISIC in your profile to unlock all features!
error_message.unverified_limit_bid: Bid limit for guest users exceeded. Verify your ISIC in your profile to continue placing bids!
